name: proc_creation_win_iexpress_susp_execution
raw_query: any where (process.executable:"*\\iexpress.exe" or process.pe.original_file_name:"IEXPRESS.exe") and process.command_line like~ ("* -n *", "* /n *", "* –n *", "* —n *", "* ―n *") and (process.command_line like~ ("*:\\ProgramData\\*", "*:\\Temp\\*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\Tasks\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Tasks\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*", "*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*"))
